randomNumber:
\ Gforth specific, requires a modern Forth

: RANDOM-RANGE ( min max -- n )  \ returns a random number in [min, max]
    OVER - 1+                \ ( min max-min+1 ) calculate range size
    RANDOM                   \ ( min random_offset ) get random number in [0, size-1]
    +                        \ ( n ) add min to get final number
;

.( --- Random Numbers ---)
CR

.( Random Integer [1-100]: )
1 100 RANDOM-RANGE . CR

.( 5 random numbers from 1 to 10: )
CR
5 0 DO
    1 10 RANDOM-RANGE . CR
LOOP
reverseString:
: BUFFER: ( size -- addr ) \ Create a named buffer in the dictionary
    CREATE ALLOT
;

HERE 256 BUFFER: REVERSED-BUF \ A buffer for the reversed string

: REVERSE-STRING ( c-addr u -- c-addr' u ) \ reverses a string, returns new string
    DUP >R                      \ ( c-addr u ) R:( u )
    REVERSED-BUF R@           \ ( c-addr u c-addr' u )
    2DUP                      \ ( c-addr u c-addr' u c-addr' u )
    MOVE                      \ ( c-addr u c-addr' )
    SWAP DROP                 \ ( c-addr' )
    R>                        \ ( c-addr' u )
    OVER + SWAP               \ ( c-addr' c-addr'+u )
    DO
        I C@                  \ ( c-addr' char )
        -1 REVERSED-BUF +!      \ ( c-addr' ) place char in buffer backwards
    LOOP
    REVERSED-BUF SWAP           \ ( u c-addr' ) return new string
;

S" Hello, Forth!" CR DUP TYPE \ Display original
REVERSE-STRING CR DUP TYPE    \ Display reversed
CR
fibonacci:
: FIB ( n -- fib_n ) \ calculates the nth Fibonacci number iteratively
    0 1          \ ( 0 1 )
    DUP 0= IF NIP EXIT THEN \ Handle F(0)
    1-           \ ( 0 1 n-1 )
    0 ?DO        \ Loop n-1 times
        OVER +   \ ( a b a+b )
        SWAP     \ ( a+b a )
    LOOP
    NIP          \ ( fib_n ) drop the second-to-last number
;

.( First 15 Fibonacci numbers: )
CR
15 0 DO
    I FIB .      \ Calculate and print F(i)
LOOP
CR
factorial:
: FACTORIAL ( n -- n! ) \ calculates factorial iteratively
    DUP 0= IF DROP 1 EXIT THEN \ Factorial of 0 is 1
    DUP          \ ( n n )
    1+ 1 ?DO     \ ( n ) Loop from 1 to n
        I * \ ( n*... )
    LOOP
;

.( Factorial of 5 is ) 5 FACTORIAL . CR
.( Factorial of 0 is ) 0 FACTORIAL . CR
.( Factorial of 20 is ) 20 FACTORIAL . CR \ Forth integers are often 64-bit
primeCheck:
: IS-PRIME? ( n -- flag ) \ returns true if n is prime
    DUP 2 < IF DROP 0 EXIT THEN  \ Not prime if < 2
    DUP 3 <= IF DROP -1 EXIT THEN \ 2 and 3 are prime
    DUP 2 MOD 0= SWAP 3 MOD 0= OR IF DROP 0 EXIT THEN \ Check divisibility by 2 or 3

    5             \ ( n i )
    BEGIN
        2DUP      \ ( n i n i )
        * >       \ ( n i i*i>n? ) check if i*i > n
    WHILE
        2DUP      \ ( n i n i )
        MOD 0=    \ ( n i n%i==0? )
        OVER 2+   \ ( n i n%i==0? i+2 )
        OVER      \ ( n i n%i==0? i+2 n )
        SWAP      \ ( n i n%i==0? n i+2 )
        MOD 0=    \ ( n i n%i==0? n%(i+2)==0? )
        OR        \ ( n i flag )
        IF DROP 0 EXIT THEN \ Divisor found, not prime
        6 +       \ ( n i+6 ) step i by 6
    REPEAT
    2DROP -1      \ No divisors found, is prime
;

17 IS-PRIME? IF .( 17 is prime ) ELSE .( 17 is not prime ) THEN CR
25 IS-PRIME? IF .( 25 is prime ) ELSE .( 25 is not prime ) THEN CR
readFile:
S" forth_read_test.txt" \ ( c-addr u )
256 ALLOCATE THROW >R       \ ( c-addr u ) R:( buf_addr )

\ Create a dummy file
S" W/O" S" forth_read_test.txt" CREATE-FILE THROW >R \ R:( buf_addr fileid )
S" First line from Forth.\n" R@ WRITE-FILE THROW DROP
S" Second line.\n" R@ WRITE-FILE THROW DROP
R> CLOSE-FILE THROW \ R:( buf_addr )

.( --- Reading file 'forth_read_test.txt' --- ) CR

S" R/O" S" forth_read_test.txt" OPEN-FILE THROW >R \ R:( buf_addr fileid )

BEGIN
    R@ >R R> DUP >R \ R:( buf_addr fileid fileid )
    255 READ-LINE THROW \ R:( buf_addr fileid len ior )
    \ ior is 0 on success, -1 on EOF
WHILE
    NIP DUP 0 > IF CR TYPE THEN DROP \ R:( buf_addr fileid )
REPEAT
2DROP \ R:( buf_addr )

R> CLOSE-FILE THROW \ R:( )
FREE THROW CR
writeFile:
\ Create a new file and write to it
S" W/O" S" output_forth.txt" CREATE-FILE THROW >R \ R:( fileid )

S" This line overwrites existing content.\n" R@ WRITE-FILE THROW DROP
S" Written from a Forth program.\n" R@ WRITE-FILE THROW DROP

R> CLOSE-FILE THROW \ R:( )
.( Wrote to output_forth.txt ) CR

\ Append to the same file
S" A+ W/O" S" output_forth.txt" OPEN-FILE THROW >R \ R:( fileid ) Gforth specific

S" --- Appended Content ---\n" R@ WRITE-FILE THROW DROP
R@ FILE-POSITION THROW >D DROP \ ( hi lo ) reposition to end

R> CLOSE-FILE THROW \ R:( )
.( Appended to output_forth.txt ) CR
fileExists:
: FILE-EXISTS? ( c-addr u -- flag )
    R/O OPEN-FILE THROW \ ( fileid ior )
    DUP 0= IF \ if ior is 0, open was successful
        SWAP CLOSE-FILE THROW \ close the file
        -1 \ return true
    ELSE
        NIP 0 \ drop fileid, return false
    THEN
;

S" forth.json" FILE-EXISTS? IF .( forth.json exists ) ELSE .( forth.json does not exist ) THEN CR
S" no_such_file.fth" FILE-EXISTS? IF .( no_such_file.fth exists ) ELSE .( no_such_file.fth does not exist ) THEN CR
dateTime:
: .DATE ( s m h d m y -- )
    ." Year: " . CR
    ." Month: " . CR
    ." Day: " . CR
    ." Hour: " . CR
    ." Minute: " . CR
    ." Second: " . CR
;

.( --- Current Date and Time --- ) CR
GET-TIME \ ( s m h d m y )
.DATE
CR
maxInArray:
CREATE NUMBERS 10 , 5 , 42 , 17 , 99 , -5 , 0 ,
HERE NUMBERS - CONSTANT NUMBERS-SIZE

: MAX-IN-ARRAY ( addr count -- max )
    DUP 1 < IF 2DROP 0 EXIT THEN \ Return 0 for empty array
    OVER @       \ ( addr count first_val )
    ROT          \ ( count first_val addr )
    CELL+ SWAP 1- \ ( first_val addr+cell count-1 )
    0 ?DO
        OVER @   \ ( current_max addr' val )
        MAX      \ ( current_max new_max )
        SWAP     \ ( new_max current_max )
        CELL+ SWAP \ ( current_max' addr'' )
    LOOP
    NIP          \ ( max )
;

.( Array: )
NUMBERS NUMBERS-SIZE CELL/ 0 DO NUMBERS I CELLS + @ . LOOP CR

NUMBERS NUMBERS-SIZE CELL/ MAX-IN-ARRAY
.( Maximum value: ) . CR
